name: Premium Reduction via Assignment Reconsideration

eligibility.description: Assigned operators who can provide a prima facie case of error in the assignment of a coal industry retiree to their account.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Operators can request a review of beneficiary assignments. If an error is found, the Commissioner must reduce future premiums or repay all premiums previously paid for that beneficiary.
